## Channel

- [ ] X

## Goal

What should this post help the project achieve?

## Draft

Paste the proposed text or carousel outline.

## GitHub link

What issue, PR, roadmap entry or doc should this post point back to?

## Safety checklist

- [ ] Does not imply production readiness
- [ ] Does not imply Apple endorsement
- [ ] Does not include Apple logos or product silhouettes
- [ ] Does not include real private data
- [ ] Does not make unsupported performance claims
- [ ] Points back to GitHub for action
